title: Internal Meeting Notes Cleanup
team_context: Synthetic operations team considering whether AI can help turn public-safe meeting bullets into a clearer internal recap.
workflow_summary: A team member pastes synthetic or non-sensitive meeting bullets into an AI tool, asks for a clearer summary, then checks the summary before saving it in the team's ordinary notes.
ai_use_case: AI may reformat public-safe bullets, group action items, and suggest neutral wording. AI may not add commitments, infer private context, contact anyone, or make decisions.
recommended_controls: Use only synthetic or non-sensitive meeting bullets.
Check that the summary does not invent decisions, owners, dates, or promises.
Keep a human owner for final saved notes.
Escalate if private personnel, customer, legal, financial, health, or security details appear.
notes: Low-risk proceed-with-standard-review example. It does not remove the need for ordinary human checking before reuse.
